text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Pardon, I was just wondering: do you have any
interest in soccer?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Soccer? I sometimes kick data around with Argos,
if that's close enough.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you like to play on my team, then? I
got invited to join a game on our day off, but
we're still looking for players.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Ah! But... I fear we exist on different Planes...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Different planes? Um... Do you mean to say that
we're on different skill levels?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
The Neo Universe might incur static, obfuscating
team Communications...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's perfectly fine to be less experienced, but if
you're feeling nervous, I'd be happy to practice
with you before the game.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Are you... certain? If it's okay... then I will
"Endeavor."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Let's make it a great match!

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Thank you too. I hear such a gentle Harmony...

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
I will make many "Endeavors" and do "my very
bestest."
